meta.name: Marble Skill Taxonomy v1 → Australian Curriculum v9 (F-6) crosswalk
meta.method: Semantic similarity (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) with exact-term TF-IDF boost, constrained by subject compatibility and year-level overlap (±1 year, age≈year+5). Machine-generated and unreviewed: treat as candidate alignments for human review, not compliance-grade mappings.

statuses.mapped: one or more candidate AC9 codes
statuses.no_f6_match: no plausible F-6 content description (often UK/US-specific or finer-grained than ACARA)
statuses.general_capabilities: aligns to ACARA General Capabilities, not learning-area content

licences.taxonomy: Marble Skill Taxonomy v1 (c) Generative Spark, Inc. — ODbL 1.0 / CC BY-SA 4.0
licences.acara: Australian Curriculum v9 (c) ACARA — CC BY 4.0
licences.crosswalk: Derivative database of the taxonomy — ODbL 1.0 share-alike applies

meta.limitations: v0.1 was matched against 475 of the 614 F-6 content descriptions (a parsing gap excluded sub-strand content, including English phonics codes; the complete 614-record set now ships in data/curriculum-standards.json under slug acara-v9). no_f6_match statuses are therefore upper bounds. A v0.2 re-match against the full set is planned. All matches are machine-generated and unreviewed - candidates for human review, not curated alignments.
